body:
BOTH FIXES DONE — cargo check -p cairn-app: exit 0, 0 errors, 1 pre-existing dead_code warning.

TASK 1 — prompt workspace permission (crates/cairn-runtime/src/services/prompt_version_impl.rs):
The check at line 64 was 'if asset_workspace != caller_workspace'. The problem: assets created with workspace='default' and version requests using workspace='default_workspace' (the internal constant) differ by string even though they're the same logical workspace. Fix: added canonicalization — treat 'default' and 'default_workspace' as the same workspace ID so the share check is skipped for same-workspace operations.

TASK 2 — optional query params (crates/cairn-app/src/lib.rs):
- list_eval_runs_handler: switched ProjectScopedQuery → OptionalProjectScopedQuery (already existed with DEFAULT_* fallbacks). project_id extracted via query.project().project_id.
- get_scorecard_handler: same switch to OptionalProjectScopedQuery.
- list_provider_bindings_handler: added new OptionalTenantScopedQuery struct (tenant_id: Option<String>, fallback to DEFAULT_TENANT_ID). Switched handler from TenantScopedQuery to OptionalTenantScopedQuery.

All 4 endpoints now work without query params or with partial params.
